description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a rectangular, hedged lot featuring a manicured lawn and a mix of paved and landscaped areas. The main building is white with black gable and flat roof sections, and includes multiple large windows, a front porch with steps, and a detached garage. The backyard contains a spacious patio, a swimming pool, and a fenced perimeter for privacy. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and trees, and there is a driveway leading to the garage. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with metal accents on the roof and doors. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern white bungalow with black roof accents, large windows, a front porch, detached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool within a hedged lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, landscaped entry path, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the backyard pool area with patio and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, and the open lawn area with fencing and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, rear of the house, and the pool area with the hedged boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
